Author: OOFGames
Name: Gamba Where
Punchline: Find and host FFXIV gambling events near you.
Description: Browse active gambling events across Eorzea or host your own session. Use /gambawhere to open the interface.
Changelog:
- Added IPC to Mini Games Emporium, alert on window open and session game info detection.
- Fixed location bug where it was trying to send the location names based on client language.
